title: 以下、Kernel/FUGUEに活用できる？ Server: SimpleHTTP/0.6 Python/3.11.9
summary_text: `BLOCKED` Requested action: `openai/skills` を Kernel/FUGUE に採用すべきか、Kernel orchestration 下で最終推奨すること。 Active lanes: - `Codex/main`: routing / synthesis / conflict resolution - `GLM/session 76001 [phase:plan] [family:external-review] [provider_hint:glm]`: completed - `Archimedes [phase:critique] [family:risk] [provider_hint:codex]`: completed - `Lagrange [phase:repair] [family:governance] [provider_hint:codex]`: completed - `delegate inventory/session 44379`: completed, available bridge scripts = `delegate-gemini.js delegate-glm.js delegate-grok.js delegate-manus.js delegate.js` Missing lanes: - `Claude adjudication lane` - `Second non-Codex diversity lane` for valid fallback quorum Exact reason: - `Claude` probe failed in this run: `{"provider":"claude","timeout_seconds":20,"stdout":"","stderr":""}` - Claude fallback priority 1 `Copilot` failed in this run: `{"provider":"copilot","timeout_seconds":20,"stdout":"","stderr":""}` - Claude fallback priority 2 `Gemini` failed in this run with a concrete provider error: `Error fetching from https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/gemini-3.1-pro-preview:generateContent: fetch failed` - Available bridge inventory in this run does not include a Claude worker delegate: `delegate-gemini.js delegate-glm.js delegate-grok.js delegate-manus.js delegate.js` - Kernel policy requires `Codex + Claude + GLM`, or a valid evidence-backed fallback quorum with `Codex + 2 non-Codex lanes` - This run has only `Codex + GLM` with concrete evidence, so final recommendation must fail closed 暫定の working judgment は変わりません。`openai/skills` は `orchestration` ではなく `lane capability package` としてなら条件付きで有効です。Codex/GLM レーンで一致している最低条件は、`repo-pinned skills`, 高リスクでの `allow_implicit_invocation: false`, `scripts/` を含む権限制御, provider parity/replay tests, supply-chain/SBOM checks, audit ledger, rollback readiness です。ただしこの run では user 指定の Kernel 合議要件を満たしていないため、最終推奨として確定はできません。
